description.content: Manage in-app product and subscription purchases, including verification, acknowledgment, and consumption of purchase tokens.
Checks the purchase and consumption status of an in-app product. Returns the purchase details including the purchase state, consumption state, and order ID.

variable.description: (Required) The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.
(Required) The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).
(Required) The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

Lists the purchases that were cancelled, refunded, or charged back. Voided purchases include both in-app product purchases and subscription purchases.

query.description: The time (in milliseconds since Epoch) of the oldest voided purchase to return. Defaults to 30 days before the current time.
The time (in milliseconds since Epoch) of the newest voided purchase to return.
Maximum number of results to return. Default and maximum is 1000.
Index of the first result to return.
Continuation token for paging through results.
The type of voided purchases to return. 0 for voided in-app product purchases, 1 for voided subscription purchases.

The Google Play Developer API allows you to perform a number of publishing and app-management tasks. It includes the Subscriptions and In-App Purchases API, which lets you manage in-app purchases and subscriptions, and the Reviews API for retrieving and replying to user reviews. This specification covers the purchases, reviews, and subscriptions resources of the Google Play Developer API v3.

 Name: Google Play Developer Support
